# Test: apx lint with actual buf execution
# Verifies that buf lint succeeds on valid proto files

# Setup: initialize a canonical repo with a valid proto file
mkdir lint-test
cd lint-test

exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=test-apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# buf.work.yaml must NOT be generated (v2 config uses buf.yaml only)
! exists buf.work.yaml

# Create a valid proto file that passes STANDARD lint rules
mkdir -p proto/test/v1
cp $WORK/valid.proto proto/test/v1/test.proto

# Lint the proto directory — must succeed
exec apx lint proto

# Lint with explicit --format flag
exec apx lint --format=proto proto

# Test with non-existent file (should fail)
! exec apx lint /tmp/nonexistent_file_12345.proto

# Cleanup
cd ..
rm -rf lint-test

-- valid.proto --
syntax = "proto3";

package test.v1;

message GetTestRequest {
  string id = 1;
}

message GetTestResponse {
  string result = 1;
}

service TestService {
  rpc GetTest(GetTestRequest) returns (GetTestResponse);
}
